description.value: Hiral Labs Limited is a pharmaceutical company based in Sisona, Roorkee, dedicated to the manufacturing, marketing, and export of a comprehensive range of pharmaceutical formulations. They offer quality products across diverse therapeutic segments, including oncology, anti-bacterial, anti-diabetic, and nutraceuticals, serving healthcare needs globally.

reviews.author: bros ent
reviews.text: Hiral Labs. is one of the best plant in Uttarakhand to get manufactured international standard quality products. The admirable characteristic of Hiral Labs is their timely delivery . The Marketing executives are also appreciable , as they response in proper manner while there is any kind of query . The owner of this Organization is really highly regard-able person. He is well responsive and clear minded .

reviews.author: Sudheer Kumar
reviews.text: Company is very good in product quality.

reviews.author: KIRAN JOSHI
reviews.text: We have been working with Hiral labs since 10 years, Hiral lab offers best quality products, timely delivery schedules. Overall very much satisfied with our association with Hiral labs.

reviews.author: Chetan Pujara
reviews.text:
Associated with Hiral Lab & His Team more than 6 years, yet no complain of quality  as well as packing or anything related to stability of products,
moreover smooth coordination with marketing team & timely supply of products which is the key success of HIRAL LABS & TEAM.

reviews.author: Rohit
reviews.text: we glad to work with your company, your quality of products is good and your staff very professional and cooperative. we dealing with Shubham Bhatt he take his client seriously and resolve all issue as soon as possible which we like most. your sales,dispatch, designing and commitment and all very impressive.

reviews.author: Nopex Healthcare
reviews.text: Hiral Labs is one of the trusted, manufacturing company, produces all products with best quality, We have an experience of working with Hiral labs more than 5 years

reviews.author: Parag Lalpura
reviews.text: Hiral labs is manufacturing Kristal Pharmaceutical products for last 7 years & they did phenomenal job. There was no compromise in quality & they ensured best quality. Kristal Pharmaceutical is manufacturing 30 products at Hiral Labs.

reviews.author: cezane remedies
reviews.text: hiral labs is one of the trusted & committed manufracting company. we have working with hiral labs more than 12 years..we appreciate on time delivery and also quality products ...

reviews.author: KAREKIND PHARMACEUTICAL
reviews.text:
We appreciate hiral lab limited
for honest efforts to provide us a quality products and have professional approach to co-operate  us in growth as a hole.
We pray and hope. hiral lab limited will mentain same approach and professionalism.
We wish all good luck.

reviews.author: Order Treatwell Pharma
reviews.text: Hiral labs is one of the best company with their best Quality Products,Management & Services and Staff is very Co-Operative A great Experience Working with him.

reviews.author: VILTIS PHARMA
reviews.text: HIRAL LABS LIMITED IS TIMELY GIVEN ALL PRODUCTS & SERVICE. ITS GOOD MANUFACTURER WITH QUALITY PRODUCTS. WE ARE HAPPY WITH THEIR SERVICE ALSO.

reviews.author: Rohit Kumar
reviews.text: Dealing with Hiral Labs is like dealing with " Sarkaari company". No one responds .Review have given by their employees only .

reviews.author: J. K. Singh
reviews.text: Associated since 13 years. having very nice experience with them. Good quality, dispatch and well organised working system.proud to be associated with them.

reviews.author: Mohd Dilshad
reviews.text: Very nice place and best Wark

reviews.author: Vikas Saini
reviews.text:
I Love Hiral labs Ltd.
Company is very good in product quality.

reviews.author: STERIS HEALTHCARE
reviews.text: EXCELLENT MANUFACTURER TIMELY DELIVERY WITH ASSURED QUALITY. FRIENDLY MARKETING TEAM.

reviews.author: approval anax
reviews.text: Favorable service with good quality.....Pleasure to be in your clientele

reviews.text: Quality Products, Timely supplies. Excellent Experience.

reviews.author: Prem Kumar
reviews.text: Pathetic company.Poor customer service.Callous attitude of marketing staff towards customers.

social_profiles._note: LinkedIn post scraping disabled — LinkedIn blocks public scrapers

plan_execution.reasoning: The seller record contains company information and a website. There are no raw products provided, but the run_product_agent will be called to attempt to discover products from the website. The run_reviews_agent will be skipped as no reviews API URL is present. The run_company_agent will be run first to establish seller context, followed by run_product_agent and run_dedup_agent, and finally write_to_catalog.
